summary: Extracted pure internal/shellsafe sanitizers (AuthKey returns stripped bool, ShellArg); actions.go delegates and emits the existing ui.Warn verbatim; tests moved to shellsafe_test.go; build+vet+tests green.

Added internal/tailscale/client.go: Client interface (FindPeer/PingPeer/GetAuthKey/Connect/CleanupDevices), CLI struct delegating to existing package funcs, and NewClient() Client; plus client_test.go. No behavior change; go build/vet/test ./... green.
